subject: Re: Fish Hawk Marina
body:
offer 750 marina alone ,900 with boat


----- Original Message ----
From: "DKIESQ@aol.com" <DKIESQ@aol.com>
To: jeeproject@yahoo.com
Sent: Friday, May 4, 2007 1:56:32 PM
Subject: Fish Hawk Marina


One of Amerling's local buddies is good friends with April Newland, the listing realtor for Fish Hawk Marina.  Amerling's buddy feigned interest in the Marina but told April that the Marina just does not have enough to justify the listing price.  The realtor advised that the seller came up with the $2 MM number on his own.  The seller received low ball offers in the range of $500k and refused to respond.  The information that the realtor gave Amerling's buddy is that the seller is looking for approximately $1,000,000.  John thinks that the boat may be worth   $100k
 
Bruce said that his real estate friends were looking to be retained and would not provide him with any info.  Which is why Bruce went to John Amerling for advice.
 
So, $500K is too low.  Bruce is no help and Amerling believes that the number that the seller will accept is $1,000,000?  How much should I offer for the property and how much should I offer for the boat which is listed at $175k?
 
Darren K. Indyke
Attorney-At-Law
457 Madison Avenue
4th Floor
New York, New York 10022
Tel: 212-750-1176
Fax: 212-750-0381
e-mail: dkiesq@aol.com

One of Amerling's local buddies is good friends with April Newland, the listing realtor for Fish Hawk Marina.  Amerling's buddy feigned interest in the Marina but told April that the Marina just does not have enough to justify the listing price.  The realtor advised that the seller came up with the $2 MM number on his own.  The seller received low ball offers in the range of $500k and refused to respond.  The information that the realtor gave Amerling's buddy is that the seller is looking for approximately $1,000,000.  John thinks that the boat may be worth   $100k
 
Bruce said that his real estate friends were looking to be retained and would not provide him with any info.  Which is why Bruce went to John Amerling for advice.
 
So, $500K is too low.  Bruce is no help and Amerling believes that the number that the seller will accept is $1,000,000?  How much should I offer for the property and how much should I offer for the boat which is listed at $175k?
